name: dm-review
description: Code review orchestrator that launches parallel review agents across accessibility, security, architecture, CSS, voice, and governance domains for Go+Templ+Datastar, Craft CMS, and Live Wires projects

skills.name: Code Review Orchestrator
skills.description: Launches parallel specialized review agents across accessibility, security, architecture, and CSS domains

skills.name: Visual Browser Testing
skills.description: Standalone visual browser testing for rendered web pages using Playwright

agents.name: Architecture Reviewer
agents.description: Verifies component boundaries, SOLID principles, layering, and coupling

agents.name: Code Simplicity Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews code for unnecessary complexity, redundancy, and dead code

agents.name: Craft Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews Craft CMS Twig templates and PHP modules for Craft-specific patterns

agents.name: Doc Sync Reviewer
agents.description: Verifies that code changes are reflected in documentation

agents.name: Go Build Verifier
agents.description: Verifies Go and Templ code compiles and passes go vet

agents.name: Pattern Recognition Specialist
agents.description: Identifies anti-patterns, naming inconsistencies, and convention violations

agents.name: Security Auditor
agents.description: Reviews code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities and stack-specific attack vectors

agents.name: Test Coverage Reviewer
agents.description: Verifies adequate test coverage for changed code

agents.name: Visual Browser Tester
agents.description: Tests rendered pages for visual regressions, responsive layout, and runtime accessibility

agents.name: Review Consolidator
agents.description: Synthesizes findings from all review agents into a unified report with deduplication

agents.name: Review Memory Recorder
agents.description: Records review summaries to ai-memory knowledge graph after consolidation

commands.name: Full Review
commands.description: Full code review with all applicable agents including visual browser testing
commands.argumentHint: [optional: PR number, branch name, or file path]

commands.name: Review Fix
commands.description: Resolve pending review findings from todos/ directory
commands.argumentHint: [optional: specific todo ID or priority like p1]

commands.name: Quick Review
commands.description: Quick code review with 5 core agents only
commands.argumentHint: [optional: PR number, branch name, or file path]

commands.name: Visual Review
commands.description: Run visual browser testing on rendered pages
